articles.summary: Struggling with onboarding? 35% of HR professionals are grappling with the same issue: new employees are simply getting lost in the “sink or swim” approach.

WAYMO RAISES $5.6B
articles.summary: Waymo's driverless taxi service is well-loved. The company has raised extra capital to expand beyond the several cities and millions of miles already in operation.

articles.title: PIXTRAL 12B WEIGHTS RELEASED
articles.summary: Pixtral 12B base model weights have been released on Hugging Face.

articles.title: AI JEWELRY
articles.summary: Arcade AI has built a generative product platform for creating unique and quality jewelry items from text prompts. The best part is, you can buy what you prompt.

articles.title: EVALUATING FEATURE STEERING
articles.summary: How do you evaluate the ability and efficacy of feature steering? Anthropic experimented with Golden Gate Claude earlier this year. It found that many features, especially similar safety ones, share common ranges for control.

articles.title: CROSSCODERS
articles.summary: Crosscoders are an extension of sparse autoencoders that can be used to better understand internal mechanisms of language models.

articles.summary: With a sophisticated combination of advanced retrieval, ranking, and more, Sendbird's unique RAG methodology minimizes hallucinations & achieves industry-leading chatbot performance. NOTEBOOKLLAMA
articles.summary: Meta has released a quick start guide to recreate a basic version of the very popular NotebookLM system from Google.

articles.title: CHART REASONING IN MLLMS
articles.summary: Code-as-Intermediary Translation (CIT) is a novel method for enhancing visual reasoning in multimodal language models (MLLMs) that uses code to translate chart visuals into text.

articles.title: A PROBABILISTIC VISION-LANGUAGE MODEL
articles.summary: Probabilistic Language-Image Pre-training (ProLIP) is a vision-language model (VLM) that learns from image-text pairs probabilistically. Unlike traditional models that assume a strict one-to-one match, ProLIP captures the many-to-many relationships in real-world data.

articles.title: META INTRODUCES SPIRIT LM OPEN SOURCE MODEL THAT COMBINES TEXT AND SPEECH INPUTS/OUTPUTS
articles.summary: Meta has launched an open-source multimodal language model designed to integrate text and speech inputs and outputs with expressive, natural-sounding speech capabilities. Meta Spirit LM aims to outperform existing voice AI by using phonetic, pitch, and tone tokens to enhance emotional expression and maintain natural expressiveness in tasks like ASR, TTS, and speech classification.

articles.title: HOW I STUDIED LLMS IN TWO WEEKS: A COMPREHENSIVE ROADMAP
articles.summary: This article outlines a 14-day learning roadmap to understanding LLM fundamentals that covers topics like self-attention, hallucination, and advanced techniques like Mixture of Experts. It includes resources on building an LLM from scratch, various literature, and online materials, all compiled in a GitHub repository. The article emphasizes a personalized learning approach and highlights the importance of foundational math, programming, and deep learning concepts.

articles.title: IBM DEBUTS OPEN SOURCE GRANITE 3.0 LLMS FOR ENTERPRISE AI
articles.summary: IBM is expanding its enterprise AI offerings with the new Granite 3.0 LLMs, focusing on open-source solutions and performance. These models, available on multiple platforms, include safety features and are tailored for various enterprise use cases. IBM emphasizes the importance of real open-source licensing with Apache 2.0 to enable flexible enterprise adoption and innovation.

MARLY
articles.summary: Marly is an open-source data processor that allows agents to query unstructured data with JSON.

articles.title: MICROSOFT INTRODUCES ‘AI EMPLOYEES' THAT CAN HANDLE CLIENT QUERIES
articles.summary: Microsoft is launching autonomous AI agents to enhance productivity, allowing businesses to build custom bots for tasks like customer service and supply chain management.

articles.title: BYTEDANCE INTERN FIRED FOR PLANTING MALICIOUS CODE IN AI MODELS
articles.summary: ByteDance has confirmed an intern interfered with AI model training and dismissed exaggerated claims of tens of millions in losses.
